name: second-headless-app-builder
description: Build and iterate local Second headless apps from Claude or Codex using the packaged Second CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Build local Second apps from your own agent
interface.longDescription: Use the packaged Second CLI to start a local headless Second runtime, edit the generated app workspace, run the real preview build, auto-approve local agents.json safely, and return a live app URL while the user keeps talking to their own Claude or Codex.
defaultPrompt: Build a visual Second app around this task
